mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, mechanically depressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly lower when rates rise.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, it signals labor market deterioration and impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >55% of instances where UNRATE crosses the 5.0% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of rising retail sales and declining interest rates amplifies consumer spending power, boosting corporate revenue expectations and producing positive forward equity returns.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance in multivariate regression; signal fails to predict direction in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain normalization, which triggers short-term positive market repricing over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal reverses direction during supply-constrained regimes; 5-day forward returns are negative when INDPRO growth exceeds 0.5% MoM.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising household income, which supports corporate earnings and generates positive forward market returns.
failure_condition: Correlation between PAYEMS growth and 20-day returns falls below 0.05; positive payroll surprises yield negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index breaches 220.0, it triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and causing negative forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Market absorbs inflation shocks without drawdowns; 60-day returns remain positive in >50% of threshold crossings.

mechanism_narrative: The simultaneous decline in unemployment and expansion in housing starts signals a synchronized labor-housing recovery, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: Housing market decouples from labor data; joint signal yields negative returns in >65% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth above trend confirms robust aggregate demand, validating earnings forecasts and supporting positive forward market performance over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: GDP growth fails to translate to equity gains during stagflationary periods; forward returns are negative when GDPC1 growth exceeds 2.0% QoQ annualized.
